title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.task: Discuss how the way we consume news has changed with these sources, then decide which two are the most reliable in the modern world.

script.text: Now, I’d like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ways people get their news today.
Now decide which two sources you think are the most reliable for staying informed.
